context: An elderly woman tends her vegetable stall during a lively market day filled with customers, food aromas, and chatter.

actions.description: Woman stands behind the stall and arranges crisp cucumbers and lush greens under the canopy.
She smiles warmly toward customers while marketgoers move past surrounding stalls.
She adjusts plump tomatoes and presents the colorful display as the market bustle continues.
